item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 26min Final chance to enter our bracket challenge before play starts at 10am.
Enter here: https:// com
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 26min Final chance to enter our bracket challenge before play starts at 10am.
Enter here: https:// commoninja.site/wc-bracket Cita WST @WeAreWST · 16 abr. THE DRAW IS SET...NOW FILL OUT YOUR BRACKETS!
- Predict every match - Points go up with every round - Take on friends and family plus the #SnookerClub podcast team - VIP tickets to the 2027 World Championship for the winner
Enter directly here: https:// commoninja.site/wc-bracket
Full 2 2 mil

item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 27min Can Zhao Xintong dominate snooker?
I spoke to John Higgins, Mark Selby and Neil Robertso
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 27min Can Zhao Xintong dominate snooker?
I spoke to John Higgins, Mark Selby and Neil Robertson about the world champ.
And the man himself on how he is feeling before his title defence.
All here De metro.co.uk 1 5 230

item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 1h Here's every player at the Crucible this year ranked by form.
No prizes for guessing who is
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 1h Here's every player at the Crucible this year ranked by form.
No prizes for guessing who is number one.
There are a few who arrive in Sheffield without many - or any - wins at all lately. De metro.co.uk 1 2 10 591

item.title: rperrins81: Talking Snooker reposteó richard perrins @rperrins81 · 9h En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker This was one of my favorite ev
item.description: Talking Snooker reposteó richard perrins @rperrins81 · 9h En respuesta a @TalkingSnooker This was one of my favorite ever episodes. Slightly chaotic but you could feel the excitement of the crucible emanating from the speakers. Phil sounded particularly jaunty 1 3 240
